prompt: A female basketball player, fully elevated mid-air at the peak of a two-handed dunk, snapping the rim. Her face shows intense focus and exertion. Attire: Classic red and black basketball uniform (jersey and shorts). Red and black high-top basketball shoes. Environment: As the ball hits the rim, a massive, spherical explosion of bright red and charcoal powder bursts upward from the hoop and downward from her body. Lighting & Background: Dramatic top-down "arena" lighting, focused tightly on the player. Deep black gradient background. Style & Details: Ultra-detailed, high-speed photography style. Individual red powder particles frozen, contrasting against the ball and net. Strong contrast, sweaty skin detail. Jordan Brand-style advertising aesthetic. 8k resolution, hyper-realistic.
